title: Calamarian C-tea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Calamarian C-tea''' was a type of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] brewed from [[Plant/Legends|plants]] found in the vast [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. It found popularity with the crews of [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] serving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Food-stub}}

*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
